# Evaluate Low-Code AI Builder

## Step 1: Prerequisites
- Azure CLI logged in
- Azure OpenAI, Azure Container Apps, Azure Cosmos DB, Azure Static Web Apps access

## Step 2: Execute
```bash
node engine/index.js solution-plays/31-low-code-ai-builder/fai-manifest.json --eval
```

## Step 3: Verify
Confirm results meet thresholds.
